name: Local LLM Stack

open-webui.notes: Open WebUI's optional reload route uses the Heretic switchable chat-thinking profile through LiteLLM with a large but finite reasoning budget. Normal Local Qwen/Codex bridge requests automatically send enable_thinking=false against the same loaded backend.

managed_scope: operator UX and local infrastructure only

backend_profiles.name: textgen-exl3-q8
backend_profiles.notes: Conservative verified default. Uses TextGen ExLlamav3 with q8 KV cache and a reduced 88k context window for extra VRAM headroom. Latest staged audit showed steady core-stage behavior through Stage 4, with Stage 5 handoff/audit still a stress failure.

textgen.command: TEXTGEN_MODEL='qwen36-27Bb' TEXTGEN_LOADER='ExLlamav3' TEXTGEN_CACHE_TYPE=q8 TEXTGEN_CTX_SIZE=88064 TEXTGEN_GPU_SPLIT=22 TEXTGEN_EXLLAMAV3_MAX_CHUNK_SIZE=2048 TEXTGEN_TEMPERATURE=0.55 TEXTGEN_TOP_K=20 TEXTGEN_TOP_P=0.95 TEXTGEN_MIN_P=0.05 TEXTGEN_REPETITION_PENALTY=1.0 TEXTGEN_PRESENCE_PENALTY=1.0 TEXTGEN_ENABLE_THINKING=1 TEXTGEN_PRESERVE_THINKING=1 scripts/run_textgen_qwen_exl3.sh
textgen.notes: Serves qwen36-27Bb through TextGen ExLlamav3 with full q8 K/V cache and 88k context.

backend_profiles.name: llmfanq36-27b-tweak-no-mtp-q8-96k-no-vision
backend_profiles.display_name: TextGen EXL3 q8 96k no-MTP no-media: llmfanq36 27B tweak
backend_profiles.notes: Custom llmfan Qwen3.6 27B EXL3 4.5bpw h6 no-MTP lean variant. Disables the vision/media component, uses q8 K/V cache, 2048 ExLlamaV3 chunking, and a verified 96k context with measured VRAM headroom.

textgen.command: TEXTGEN_MODEL='llmfanq36-27b-uncen-no-mtp-exl3-4p5bpw-h6-tweak' TEXTGEN_LOADER='ExLlamav3' TEXTGEN_CACHE_TYPE=q8 TEXTGEN_CTX_SIZE=98304 TEXTGEN_GPU_SPLIT=22 TEXTGEN_EXLLAMAV3_MAX_CHUNK_SIZE=2048 TEXTGEN_DISABLE_VISION=1 TEXTGEN_TEMPERATURE=0.55 TEXTGEN_TOP_K=20 TEXTGEN_TOP_P=0.95 TEXTGEN_MIN_P=0.05 TEXTGEN_REPETITION_PENALTY=1.0 TEXTGEN_PRESENCE_PENALTY=0.0 TEXTGEN_FREQUENCY_PENALTY=0.0 TEXTGEN_ENABLE_THINKING=1 TEXTGEN_PRESERVE_THINKING=1 TEXTGEN_SPEC_TYPE=none scripts/run_textgen_qwen_exl3.sh
textgen.notes: Custom llmfan Qwen3.6 27B EXL3 4.5bpw h6 no-MTP lean variant. Disables the vision/media component, uses q8 K/V cache, 2048 ExLlamaV3 chunking, and a verified 96k context with measured VRAM headroom.

backend_profiles.description: Headroom profile. Vision/mmproj disabled; start at 32k and raise context after live VRAM check.

backend_profiles.name: simonycl-qwen3-30b-plateau-6skill-0617-iter399-exl3-4p5bpw-h6
backend_profiles.display_name: TextGen EXL3 q8 34k no-thinking: SimonYCL Qwen3 30B Plateau iter399
backend_profiles.notes: Direct plain EXL3 4.5bpw h6 quant of simonycl/qwen3-30b-plateau-6skill-0617-iter399. Native non-thinking checkpoint; uses TextGen ExLlamav3, q8 K/V cache, model-card sampling defaults, and a tested 34816-token context with about 1.5 GB free VRAM.

textgen.display_name: TextGen EXL3 SimonYCL Qwen3 30B Plateau iter399
textgen.command: TEXTGEN_MODEL='simonycl-qwen3-30b-plateau-6skill-0617-iter399-EXL3-4.5bpw-h6' TEXTGEN_LOADER='ExLlamav3' TEXTGEN_CACHE_TYPE=q8 TEXTGEN_CTX_SIZE=34816 TEXTGEN_GPU_SPLIT=22 TEXTGEN_EXLLAMAV3_MAX_CHUNK_SIZE=2048 TEXTGEN_DISABLE_VISION=1 TEXTGEN_TEMPERATURE=0.7 TEXTGEN_TOP_K=20 TEXTGEN_TOP_P=0.8 TEXTGEN_MIN_P=0 TEXTGEN_REPETITION_PENALTY=1.0 TEXTGEN_PRESENCE_PENALTY=0.0 TEXTGEN_FREQUENCY_PENALTY=0.0 TEXTGEN_ENABLE_THINKING=0 TEXTGEN_PRESERVE_THINKING=0 TEXTGEN_SPEC_TYPE=none TEXTGEN_CHAT_TEMPLATE={repo_root}/config/local_llm_stack/qwen3_simonycl_no_think_prefill.jinja scripts/run_textgen_qwen_exl3.sh
textgen.notes: Serves the plain SimonYCL Qwen3 30B Plateau iter399 EXL3 4.5bpw h6 quant through TextGen ExLlamav3 with q8 KV cache.

backend_profiles.description: Direct plain EXL3 4.5bpw h6 quant. Q8 KV cache tested at 32768, 34816, and 40960 tokens; 34816 keeps about 1.5 GB free VRAM.

backend_profiles.name: llmfanq36-27b-qwopus-coder-no-mtp-exl3-4p5bpw-h6
backend_profiles.display_name: TextGen EXL3 q8 96k no-MTP no-media: Qwopus Coder 27B
backend_profiles.notes: STAR/Codex repo-agent LoRA SFT merged into the uncensored Qwopus/Qwen3.6 27B base, stripped to text-only non-MTP tensors and quantized EXL3 4.5bpw h6. Register separately; do not promote until local harness gates pass.

textgen.command: TEXTGEN_MODEL='llmfanq36-27b-qwopus-coder-no-mtp-exl3-4p5bpw-h6' TEXTGEN_LOADER='ExLlamav3' TEXTGEN_CACHE_TYPE=q8 TEXTGEN_CTX_SIZE=98304 TEXTGEN_GPU_SPLIT=22 TEXTGEN_EXLLAMAV3_MAX_CHUNK_SIZE=2048 TEXTGEN_DISABLE_VISION=1 TEXTGEN_TEMPERATURE=0.55 TEXTGEN_TOP_K=20 TEXTGEN_TOP_P=0.95 TEXTGEN_MIN_P=0.05 TEXTGEN_REPETITION_PENALTY=1.0 TEXTGEN_PRESENCE_PENALTY=0.0 TEXTGEN_FREQUENCY_PENALTY=0.0 TEXTGEN_ENABLE_THINKING=1 TEXTGEN_PRESERVE_THINKING=1 TEXTGEN_SPEC_TYPE=none TEXTGEN_CHAT_TEMPLATE={home}/llama.cpp-codex/qwen3_codex_no_think.jinja scripts/run_textgen_qwen_exl3.sh
textgen.notes: Serves the Qwopus Coder 27B non-MTP text-only EXL3 4.5bpw h6 artifact through TextGen ExLlamav3 with q8 KV cache.

backend_profiles.description: Candidate local coder profile. Keep isolated from defaults until TextGen, bridge, harder-task, reliability, and tool-markup gates pass.

backend_profiles.name: jackrong-qwopus36-coder-exl3-4p5bpw-h6-textonly-nonmtp
backend_profiles.display_name: TextGen EXL3 q8 32k text-only: Jackrong Qwopus3.6 27B Coder
backend_profiles.notes: Direct Jackrong/Qwopus3.6-27B-Coder fallback quant, EXL3 4.5bpw h6, text-only non-MTP. Use as the official coder baseline; no Anderson training data.

textgen.command: TEXTGEN_MODEL='Jackrong-Qwopus3.6-27B-Coder-EXL3-4.5bpw-h6-textonly-nonmtp' TEXTGEN_LOADER='ExLlamav3' TEXTGEN_CACHE_TYPE=q8 TEXTGEN_CTX_SIZE=32768 TEXTGEN_GPU_SPLIT=22 TEXTGEN_EXLLAMAV3_MAX_CHUNK_SIZE=2048 TEXTGEN_DISABLE_VISION=1 TEXTGEN_TEMPERATURE=0.55 TEXTGEN_TOP_K=20 TEXTGEN_TOP_P=0.95 TEXTGEN_MIN_P=0.05 TEXTGEN_REPETITION_PENALTY=1.0 TEXTGEN_PRESENCE_PENALTY=0.0 TEXTGEN_FREQUENCY_PENALTY=0.0 TEXTGEN_ENABLE_THINKING=1 TEXTGEN_PRESERVE_THINKING=1 TEXTGEN_SPEC_TYPE=none TEXTGEN_CHAT_TEMPLATE={home}/llama.cpp-codex/qwen3_codex_no_think.jinja scripts/run_textgen_qwen_exl3.sh
textgen.notes: Direct Jackrong/Qwopus3.6-27B-Coder fallback quant, EXL3 4.5bpw h6, text-only non-MTP. Use as the official coder baseline; no Anderson training data.

backend_profiles.description: Direct Jackrong/Qwopus3.6-27B-Coder fallback quant, EXL3 4.5bpw h6, text-only non-MTP. Use as the official coder baseline; no Anderson training data.

backend_profiles.notes: Direct Jackrong/Qwopus3.6-27B-Coder fallback quant, EXL3 4.5bpw h6, vision-preserved non-MTP. Keep separate from Anderson custom models.

textgen.command: TEXTGEN_MODEL='Jackrong-Qwopus3.6-27B-Coder-EXL3-4.5bpw-h6-vision-nonmtp' TEXTGEN_LOADER='ExLlamav3' TEXTGEN_CACHE_TYPE=q8 TEXTGEN_CTX_SIZE=32768 TEXTGEN_GPU_SPLIT=22 TEXTGEN_EXLLAMAV3_MAX_CHUNK_SIZE=2048 TEXTGEN_TEMPERATURE=0.55 TEXTGEN_TOP_K=20 TEXTGEN_TOP_P=0.95 TEXTGEN_MIN_P=0.05 TEXTGEN_REPETITION_PENALTY=1.0 TEXTGEN_PRESENCE_PENALTY=0.0 TEXTGEN_FREQUENCY_PENALTY=0.0 TEXTGEN_ENABLE_THINKING=1 TEXTGEN_PRESERVE_THINKING=1 TEXTGEN_SPEC_TYPE=none TEXTGEN_CHAT_TEMPLATE={home}/llama.cpp-codex/qwen3_codex_no_think.jinja scripts/run_textgen_qwen_exl3.sh

backend_profiles.name: qwopucode-full-v15-27b-vllm-gguf-q4km-32k
backend_profiles.display_name: vLLM GGUF 32k: Qwopucode full v15 27B Q4_K_M
backend_profiles.notes: User-supplied Qwopucode GGUF served through vLLM's OpenAI-compatible server on the standard local backend port. Uses the local Jackrong/Qwopus tokenizer, the existing Qwen/Codex chat template, TextGen-matched sampler defaults where request-side proxies support them, and a 32768-token minimum context.

textgen.notes: Serves Qwopucode-full-v15-27B-FP8-Block.i1-Q4_K_M.gguf through vLLM with a 32k context window.

bridge.notes: Codex bridge context limit follows the vLLM Qwopucode 32k backend profile.

backend_profiles.description: vLLM-managed GGUF profile for the user-supplied Qwopucode full v15 27B Q4_K_M file. Keep on the standard 5000 -> 4000 -> 1234 proxy chain.

backend_profiles.name: qwopucode-full-v15-27b-llamacpp-gguf-q4km-32k
backend_profiles.display_name: llama.cpp GGUF 32k: Qwopucode full v15 27B Q4_K_M
backend_profiles.notes: Preferred GGUF-native fallback after vLLM rejected this file's qwen35 architecture. llama.cpp provides explicit full q8_0 K/V cache, flash attention, prompt cache RAM, batch/ubatch, GPU layer offload, slot controls, Qwen3.6 precise-coding sampler defaults, and thinking-on Qwen3-Coder formatting while preserving the standard local proxy chain.

textgen.command: LLAMACPP_SERVER={home}/llama.cpp-codex/src/build/bin/llama-server LLAMACPP_MODEL_PATH='{home}/.lmstudio/models/Qwen36/mradermacherQwopucode-full-v15-27B/Qwopucode-full-v15-27B-FP8-Block.i1-Q4_K_M.gguf' LLAMACPP_MODEL_ALIAS='Qwopucode-full-v15-27B-FP8-Block-i1-Q4_K_M' LLAMACPP_CTX_SIZE=32768 LLAMACPP_CACHE_TYPE_K=q8_0 LLAMACPP_CACHE_TYPE_V=q8_0 LLAMACPP_TEMPERATURE=0.6 LLAMACPP_TOP_P=0.95 LLAMACPP_TOP_K=20 LLAMACPP_MIN_P=0 LLAMACPP_CACHE_RAM=4096 LLAMACPP_PARALLEL=1 LLAMACPP_BATCH_SIZE=4096 LLAMACPP_UBATCH_SIZE=2048 LLAMACPP_GPU_LAYERS=all LLAMACPP_CHAT_TEMPLATE={home}/llama.cpp-codex/src/models/templates/Qwen3-Coder.jinja LLAMACPP_REASONING=on LLAMACPP_REASONING_FORMAT=deepseek CODEX_TEXTGEN_CONTEXT_LIMIT_TOKENS=32768 scripts/run_llamacpp_qwopucode_gguf.sh
textgen.notes: Serves Qwopucode-full-v15-27B-FP8-Block.i1-Q4_K_M.gguf through llama.cpp with 32k context, flash attention, full q8_0 K/V cache, prompt cache, two-slot concurrency control, and thinking enabled.

bridge.notes: Codex bridge context limit follows the llama.cpp Qwopucode 32k backend profile.

backend_profiles.description: Preferred memory/cache-managed GGUF profile for the Qwopucode full v15 27B Q4_K_M file. Keep on the standard 5000 -> 4000 -> 1234 proxy chain.

backend_profiles.name: qwopucode-full-v15-27b-nothink-llamacpp-gguf-q4km-32k
backend_profiles.display_name: llama.cpp GGUF 32k: Qwopucode full v15 27B Q4_K_M no-thinking
backend_profiles.notes: No-thinking apples-to-apples Qwopucode profile matching the current Qwopus/Heretic no-thinking default shape: 32k context, q8_0 K/V cache, prompt cache RAM, batch/ubatch, GPU offload, temp 0.2, and qwen3_codex_no_think.jinja template.

textgen.command: LLAMACPP_SERVER={home}/llama.cpp-codex/src/build/bin/llama-server LLAMACPP_MODEL_PATH='{home}/.lmstudio/models/Qwen36/mradermacherQwopucode-full-v15-27B/Qwopucode-full-v15-27B-FP8-Block.i1-Q4_K_M.gguf' LLAMACPP_MODEL_ALIAS='Qwopucode-full-v15-27B-FP8-Block-i1-Q4_K_M-nothink' LLAMACPP_CTX_SIZE=32768 LLAMACPP_CACHE_TYPE_K=q8_0 LLAMACPP_CACHE_TYPE_V=q8_0 LLAMACPP_TEMPERATURE=0.2 LLAMACPP_CACHE_RAM=4096 LLAMACPP_PARALLEL=1 LLAMACPP_BATCH_SIZE=4096 LLAMACPP_UBATCH_SIZE=2048 LLAMACPP_GPU_LAYERS=all LLAMACPP_CHAT_TEMPLATE={home}/llama.cpp-codex/qwen3_codex_no_think.jinja CODEX_TEXTGEN_CONTEXT_LIMIT_TOKENS=32768 scripts/run_llamacpp_qwopucode_gguf.sh
textgen.notes: Serves Qwopucode-full-v15-27B-FP8-Block.i1-Q4_K_M.gguf through llama.cpp with the same no-thinking template and sampler shape as the current Qwopus/Heretic no-thinking default.

bridge.notes: Codex bridge context limit follows the llama.cpp Qwopucode no-thinking 32k profile.

backend_profiles.description: No-thinking Qwopucode profile cloned from the Qwopus/Heretic no-thinking default shape for exact apples-to-apples measurement.

backend_profiles.name: qwopus36-coder-llamacpp-gguf-q4km-32k
backend_profiles.notes: Apples-to-apples GGUF comparison target for the Qwopus coder EXL3 workflow. Uses direct llama.cpp with explicit full q8_0 K/V cache, flash attention, prompt cache RAM, batch/ubatch, GPU layer offload, and two-slot controls.

textgen.command: LLAMACPP_SERVER={home}/llama.cpp-codex/src/build/bin/llama-server LLAMACPP_MODEL_PATH='{home}/.lmstudio/models/Qwen36/mradermacherQwopus3.6-27B-Coder-i1-GGUF/Qwopus3.6-27B-Coder.i1-Q4_K_M.gguf' LLAMACPP_MODEL_ALIAS='Qwopus3.6-27B-Coder.i1-Q4_K_M' LLAMACPP_CTX_SIZE=32768 LLAMACPP_CACHE_TYPE_K=q8_0 LLAMACPP_CACHE_TYPE_V=q8_0 LLAMACPP_TEMPERATURE=0.2 LLAMACPP_CACHE_RAM=4096 LLAMACPP_PARALLEL=1 LLAMACPP_BATCH_SIZE=4096 LLAMACPP_UBATCH_SIZE=2048 LLAMACPP_GPU_LAYERS=all LLAMACPP_CHAT_TEMPLATE={home}/llama.cpp-codex/qwen3_codex_no_think.jinja CODEX_TEXTGEN_CONTEXT_LIMIT_TOKENS=32768 scripts/run_llamacpp_qwopucode_gguf.sh
textgen.notes: Serves Qwopus3.6-27B-Coder.i1-Q4_K_M.gguf through llama.cpp with 32k context, flash attention, full q8_0 K/V cache, prompt cache, and two-slot concurrency control.

bridge.notes: Codex bridge context limit follows the llama.cpp Qwopus coder 32k backend profile.

backend_profiles.description: Memory/cache-managed GGUF profile for the Qwopus3.6 27B Coder Q4_K_M file, intended as the closest GGUF comparison to the Qwopus coder EXL3 workflow.

backend_profiles.name: qwopus36-coder-thinking-llamacpp-gguf-q4km-32k
backend_profiles.display_name: llama.cpp GGUF 32k: Qwopus3.6 27B Coder Q4_K_M thinking
backend_profiles.notes: Thinking-on fair baseline for the original Qwopus3.6 Coder GGUF. Uses the same Q4_K_M file as the current fast default, but switches from the no-thinking Codex template to Qwen3-Coder formatting with reasoning enabled and preserve_thinking passed through the llama.cpp launcher. Keep separate from the fast default until benchmark evidence supports promotion.

textgen.display_name: llama.cpp GGUF Qwopus coder thinking model
textgen.command: LLAMACPP_SERVER={home}/llama.cpp-codex/src/build/bin/llama-server LLAMACPP_MODEL_PATH='{home}/.lmstudio/models/Qwen36/mradermacherQwopus3.6-27B-Coder-i1-GGUF/Qwopus3.6-27B-Coder.i1-Q4_K_M.gguf' LLAMACPP_MODEL_ALIAS='Qwopus3.6-27B-Coder.i1-Q4_K_M-thinking' LLAMACPP_CTX_SIZE=32768 LLAMACPP_CACHE_TYPE_K=q8_0 LLAMACPP_CACHE_TYPE_V=q8_0 LLAMACPP_TEMPERATURE=0.6 LLAMACPP_TOP_P=0.95 LLAMACPP_TOP_K=20 LLAMACPP_MIN_P=0 LLAMACPP_CACHE_RAM=4096 LLAMACPP_PARALLEL=1 LLAMACPP_BATCH_SIZE=4096 LLAMACPP_UBATCH_SIZE=2048 LLAMACPP_GPU_LAYERS=all LLAMACPP_CHAT_TEMPLATE={home}/llama.cpp-codex/src/models/templates/Qwen3-Coder.jinja LLAMACPP_REASONING=on LLAMACPP_REASONING_FORMAT=deepseek CODEX_TEXTGEN_CONTEXT_LIMIT_TOKENS=32768 CODEX_TEXTGEN_MAX_OUTPUT_TOKENS=2048 CODEX_TEXTGEN_TOOL_TEMPERATURE=0.15 scripts/run_llamacpp_qwopucode_gguf.sh
textgen.notes: Serves Qwopus3.6-27B-Coder.i1-Q4_K_M.gguf through llama.cpp with 32k context, flash attention, full q8_0 K/V cache, prompt cache, Qwen3-Coder formatting, reasoning enabled, and preserve_thinking template kwargs.

bridge.command: CODEX_TEXTGEN_CONTEXT_LIMIT_TOKENS=32768 CODEX_TEXTGEN_MAX_OUTPUT_TOKENS=2048 CODEX_TEXTGEN_TOOL_TEMPERATURE=0.15 CODEX_TEXTGEN_TOOL_TOP_P=0.95 CODEX_TEXTGEN_TOOL_TOP_K=20 CODEX_TEXTGEN_TOOL_MIN_P=0 scripts/run_codex_textgen_bridge.sh
bridge.notes: Codex bridge context and sampler defaults follow the llama.cpp Qwopus Coder thinking-on 32k profile.

backend_profiles.description: Fair thinking-on baseline for the original Qwopus3.6 27B Coder Q4_K_M file, for direct comparison against the Heretic Q4_K_M preserve-thinking profile.

backend_profiles.name: qwopus36-coder-heretic-llamacpp-gguf-q4km-32k
backend_profiles.display_name: llama.cpp GGUF 32k: Qwopus3.6 27B Coder Heretic Q4_K_M
backend_profiles.notes: Staged 8sp4rk/Qwopus3.6-27B-Coder-heretic GGUF candidate. Keep separate from the current default until apples-to-apples benchmark and local-agent gates pass.

bridge.command: CODEX_TEXTGEN_CONTEXT_LIMIT_TOKENS=32768 CODEX_TEXTGEN_MAX_OUTPUT_TOKENS=2048 CODEX_TEXTGEN_TOOL_TEMPERATURE=0.15 CODEX_TEXTGEN_TOOL_TOP_P=0.95 CODEX_TEXTGEN_TOOL_TOP_K=20 CODEX_TEXTGEN_TOOL_MIN_P=0 scripts/run_codex_textgen_bridge.sh

backend_profiles.name: qwopus36-coder-heretic-thinking-budget256-llamacpp-gguf-q4km-32k
backend_profiles.display_name: llama.cpp GGUF 32k: Qwopus3.6 27B Coder Heretic Q4_K_M thinking budget 256
backend_profiles.notes: Budgeted-thinking Heretic candidate for repo tasks that benefit from reasoning without unrestricted hidden-token drift. It uses the repo-local Qwen3 Codex bounded-thinking template and Qwen 0.6/min_p=0 sampler, then caps llama.cpp reasoning at 256 tokens to reduce code-only spillover and long pre-answer wandering. Keep separate from the fast no-thinking default until repeated apples and local-agent gates prove it.

textgen.display_name: llama.cpp GGUF Qwopus coder heretic thinking budget 256 model
textgen.command: LLAMACPP_SERVER={home}/llama.cpp-codex/src/build/bin/llama-server LLAMACPP_MODEL_PATH='{home}/.lmstudio/models/Qwopus3.6-27B-Coder-heretic-Q4_K_M.gguf' LLAMACPP_MODEL_ALIAS='Qwopus3.6-27B-Coder-heretic-Q4_K_M-thinking-budget256' LLAMACPP_CTX_SIZE=32768 LLAMACPP_CACHE_TYPE_K=q8_0 LLAMACPP_CACHE_TYPE_V=q8_0 LLAMACPP_TEMPERATURE=0.6 LLAMACPP_TOP_P=0.95 LLAMACPP_TOP_K=20 LLAMACPP_MIN_P=0 LLAMACPP_CACHE_RAM=4096 LLAMACPP_PARALLEL=1 LLAMACPP_BATCH_SIZE=4096 LLAMACPP_UBATCH_SIZE=2048 LLAMACPP_GPU_LAYERS=all LLAMACPP_CHAT_TEMPLATE={repo_root}/config/local_llm_stack/qwen3_codex_budget_think.jinja LLAMACPP_REASONING=on LLAMACPP_REASONING_FORMAT=deepseek LLAMACPP_REASONING_BUDGET=256 CODEX_TEXTGEN_CONTEXT_LIMIT_TOKENS=32768 CODEX_TEXTGEN_MAX_OUTPUT_TOKENS=2048 CODEX_TEXTGEN_TOOL_TEMPERATURE=0.15 scripts/run_llamacpp_qwopucode_gguf.sh
textgen.notes: Serves Qwopus3.6-27B-Coder-heretic-Q4_K_M.gguf through llama.cpp with 32k context, flash attention, full q8_0 K/V cache, prompt cache, repo-local bounded-thinking Qwen3/Codex formatting, reasoning enabled, and --reasoning-budget 256.

bridge.command: CODEX_TEXTGEN_CONTEXT_LIMIT_TOKENS=32768 CODEX_TEXTGEN_MAX_OUTPUT_TOKENS=2048 CODEX_TEXTGEN_TOOL_TEMPERATURE=0.15 CODEX_TEXTGEN_TOOL_TOP_P=0.95 CODEX_TEXTGEN_TOOL_TOP_K=20 CODEX_TEXTGEN_TOOL_MIN_P=0 scripts/run_codex_textgen_bridge.sh
bridge.notes: Codex bridge context and sampler defaults follow the llama.cpp Qwopus Coder Heretic 32k budgeted-thinking profile.

backend_profiles.description: Budgeted-thinking Heretic Q4_K_M candidate for planning/review/harder reasoning routes; not a replacement for the fast no-thinking default until repeated evidence supports it.

backend_profiles.name: qwopus36-coder-heretic-thinking-chat2048-llamacpp-gguf-q4km-32k
backend_profiles.display_name: llama.cpp GGUF 64k chat / 64k bridge: Qwopus3.6 27B Coder Heretic Q4_K_M chat thinking 2048
backend_profiles.notes: Open WebUI chat profile for the Heretic GGUF. It uses the repo-local switchable Qwen3 Codex template and Qwen 0.6/min_p=0 sampler, with a 64k backend window, a generous but finite 2048-token llama.cpp reasoning budget, and a 4096-token server predict cap to avoid runaway chat generations. Bridge/Codex requests disable thinking per request while passing through the full hosted 64k context window.

textgen.display_name: llama.cpp GGUF Qwopus coder heretic chat thinking 2048 model
textgen.command: LLAMACPP_SERVER={home}/llama.cpp-codex/src/build/bin/llama-server LLAMACPP_MODEL_PATH='{home}/.lmstudio/models/Qwopus3.6-27B-Coder-heretic-Q4_K_M.gguf' LLAMACPP_MODEL_ALIAS='Qwopus3.6-27B-Coder-heretic-Q4_K_M-thinking-chat2048' LLAMACPP_CTX_SIZE=65536 LLAMACPP_CACHE_TYPE_K=q8_0 LLAMACPP_CACHE_TYPE_V=q8_0 LLAMACPP_TEMPERATURE=0.6 LLAMACPP_TOP_P=0.95 LLAMACPP_TOP_K=20 LLAMACPP_MIN_P=0 LLAMACPP_CACHE_RAM=4096 LLAMACPP_PARALLEL=1 LLAMACPP_BATCH_SIZE=4096 LLAMACPP_UBATCH_SIZE=2048 LLAMACPP_GPU_LAYERS=all LLAMACPP_CHAT_TEMPLATE={repo_root}/config/local_llm_stack/qwen3_codex_switchable_think.jinja LLAMACPP_REASONING=on LLAMACPP_REASONING_FORMAT=deepseek LLAMACPP_REASONING_BUDGET=2048 LLAMACPP_EXTRA_ARGS='--predict 4096' CODEX_TEXTGEN_CONTEXT_LIMIT_TOKENS=65536 CODEX_TEXTGEN_MAX_OUTPUT_TOKENS=2048 CODEX_TEXTGEN_TOOL_TEMPERATURE=0.15 scripts/run_llamacpp_qwopucode_gguf.sh
textgen.notes: Serves Qwopus3.6-27B-Coder-heretic-Q4_K_M.gguf through llama.cpp with 64k context, q8_0 K/V cache, prompt cache, repo-local switchable Qwen3/Codex formatting, --reasoning-budget 2048, and --predict 4096 for Open WebUI chat stability. Verified on 2026-06-27 with a 53,399-token LiteLLM chat prompt and about 3.2-3.5 GB free VRAM on the RTX 3090 after load.

bridge.command: CODEX_TEXTGEN_CONTEXT_LIMIT_TOKENS=65536 CODEX_TEXTGEN_MAX_OUTPUT_TOKENS=2048 CODEX_TEXTGEN_TOOL_TEMPERATURE=0.15 CODEX_TEXTGEN_TOOL_TOP_P=0.95 CODEX_TEXTGEN_TOOL_TOP_K=20 CODEX_TEXTGEN_TOOL_MIN_P=0 CODEX_TEXTGEN_ENABLE_THINKING=false CODEX_TEXTGEN_PRESERVE_THINKING=false scripts/run_codex_textgen_bridge.sh
bridge.notes: Codex bridge requests use the same loaded backend but disable thinking per request, preserving the no-reload split between Open WebUI thinking chat and repo-agent tool use. System-prompt sweep on 2026-06-27 favored tool_temperature=0.4 over preserve-thinking 0.5 on repeated stress median.

backend_profiles.description: Generous bounded-thinking Heretic Q4_K_M 64k chat profile for Open WebUI, with the Codex bridge using the same 64k hosted window while keeping no-thinking repo-agent requests.

backend_profiles.name: qwopus36-coder-heretic-thinking-unlimited-llamacpp-gguf-q4km-32k
backend_profiles.display_name: llama.cpp GGUF 32k: Qwopus3.6 27B Coder Heretic Q4_K_M thinking unlimited
backend_profiles.notes: Open WebUI chat profile for the Heretic GGUF. It uses the repo-local Qwen3 Codex thinking template and Qwen 0.6/min_p=0 sampler, then sets llama.cpp reasoning budget to -1 for unrestricted chat reasoning. Do not use as the repo-agent default; unrestricted thinking is for human chat, review, and exploratory reasoning.

textgen.display_name: llama.cpp GGUF Qwopus coder heretic unlimited-thinking chat model

textgen.notes: Serves Qwopus3.6-27B-Coder-heretic-Q4_K_M.gguf through llama.cpp with 32k context, q8_0 K/V cache, prompt cache, repo-local thinking Qwen3/Codex formatting, reasoning enabled, and --reasoning-budget -1 for unrestricted Open WebUI chat.

bridge.command: CODEX_TEXTGEN_CONTEXT_LIMIT_TOKENS=32768 CODEX_TEXTGEN_MAX_OUTPUT_TOKENS=2048 CODEX_TEXTGEN_TOOL_TEMPERATURE=0.15 CODEX_TEXTGEN_TOOL_TOP_P=0.95 CODEX_TEXTGEN_TOOL_TOP_K=20 CODEX_TEXTGEN_TOOL_MIN_P=0 scripts/run_codex_textgen_bridge.sh

Promote only if repeated benchmark evidence matches or beats the current default.

backend_profiles.name: qwopucode-full-v15-27b-koboldcpp-gguf-q4km-32k
backend_profiles.display_name: KoboldCPP GGUF 32k: Qwopucode full v15 27B Q4_K_M
backend_profiles.notes: KoboldCPP comparison profile for the Qwopucode GGUF after vLLM rejected qwen35. Uses CUDA, 32k context, q8_0 KV cache, Qwen3-Coder jinja chat formatting with thinking and preserve_thinking enabled, Qwen3.6 precise-coding sampler defaults, and SmartCache. KoboldCPP logs that MRoPE disables context shifting for this model, so repeated-prefix SmartCache/fast-forward behavior is the relevant cache feature.

textgen.command: KOBOLDCPP_BIN={home}/.local/share/qwendex/koboldcpp/koboldcpp-linux-x64 KOBOLDCPP_MODEL_PATH='{home}/.lmstudio/models/Qwen36/mradermacherQwopucode-full-v15-27B/Qwopucode-full-v15-27B-FP8-Block.i1-Q4_K_M.gguf' KOBOLDCPP_MODEL_ALIAS='Qwopucode-full-v15-27B-FP8-Block-i1-Q4_K_M' KOBOLDCPP_CTX_SIZE=32768 KOBOLDCPP_QUANT_KV=q8_0 KOBOLDCPP_TEMPERATURE=0.6 KOBOLDCPP_TOP_P=0.95 KOBOLDCPP_TOP_K=20 KOBOLDCPP_MIN_P=0 KOBOLDCPP_REPETITION_PENALTY=1.0 KOBOLDCPP_SMARTCACHE=4096 KOBOLDCPP_DEFAULT_GEN_AMT=4096 KOBOLDCPP_REQ_TIMEOUT=600 KOBOLDCPP_BATCH_SIZE=4096 KOBOLDCPP_GPU_LAYERS=-1 KOBOLDCPP_JINJA_TEMPLATE={home}/llama.cpp-codex/src/models/templates/Qwen3-Coder.jinja KOBOLDCPP_JINJA_THINK=true KOBOLDCPP_REASONING_EFFORT=high CODEX_TEXTGEN_TOOL_TEMPERATURE=0.15 CODEX_TEXTGEN_MAX_OUTPUT_TOKENS=2048 CODEX_TEXTGEN_CONTEXT_LIMIT_TOKENS=32768 scripts/run_koboldcpp_gguf.sh
textgen.notes: Serves Qwopucode-full-v15-27B-FP8-Block.i1-Q4_K_M.gguf through KoboldCPP with 32k context, CUDA, q8_0 KV cache, thinking and preserve_thinking enabled, temp 0.6, context shifting, 4096 smartcache snapshots, 4096 default generation amount, and 600s backend request timeout.

bridge.command: CODEX_TEXTGEN_CONTEXT_LIMIT_TOKENS=32768 CODEX_TEXTGEN_MAX_OUTPUT_TOKENS=2048 CODEX_TEXTGEN_TOOL_TEMPERATURE=0.15 CODEX_TEXTGEN_TOOL_TOP_P=0.95 CODEX_TEXTGEN_TOOL_TOP_K=20 CODEX_TEXTGEN_TOOL_MIN_P=0 CODEX_TEXTGEN_TOOL_REASONING_EFFORT=high scripts/run_codex_textgen_bridge.sh
bridge.notes: Codex bridge context and sampler defaults follow the KoboldCPP Qwopucode 32k preserve-thinking profile.

backend_profiles.description: KoboldCPP-managed GGUF profile for testing context shifting, smart cache, and preserve_thinking against the existing llama.cpp Qwopucode path.

backend_profiles.name: qwopus36-coder-koboldcpp-gguf-q4km-32k
backend_profiles.notes: KoboldCPP apples-to-apples comparison profile for the Qwopus coder GGUF. Uses CUDA, 32k context, q8_0 KV cache, jinja chat formatting, and SmartCache to test whether KoboldCPP's repeated-prefix cache management beats direct llama.cpp for repo-agent work. MRoPE Qwen models disable normal context shifting in KoboldCPP.

textgen.command: KOBOLDCPP_BIN={home}/.local/share/qwendex/koboldcpp/koboldcpp-linux-x64 KOBOLDCPP_MODEL_PATH='{home}/.lmstudio/models/Qwen36/mradermacherQwopus3.6-27B-Coder-i1-GGUF/Qwopus3.6-27B-Coder.i1-Q4_K_M.gguf' KOBOLDCPP_MODEL_ALIAS='Qwopus3.6-27B-Coder.i1-Q4_K_M' KOBOLDCPP_CTX_SIZE=32768 KOBOLDCPP_QUANT_KV=q8_0 KOBOLDCPP_TEMPERATURE=0.2 KOBOLDCPP_SMARTCACHE=4096 KOBOLDCPP_DEFAULT_GEN_AMT=2048 KOBOLDCPP_REQ_TIMEOUT=600 KOBOLDCPP_BATCH_SIZE=4096 KOBOLDCPP_GPU_LAYERS=-1 KOBOLDCPP_JINJA_TEMPLATE={home}/llama.cpp-codex/qwen3_codex_no_think.jinja CODEX_TEXTGEN_CONTEXT_LIMIT_TOKENS=32768 scripts/run_koboldcpp_gguf.sh
textgen.notes: Serves Qwopus3.6-27B-Coder.i1-Q4_K_M.gguf through KoboldCPP with 32k context, CUDA, q8_0 KV cache, context shifting, 4096 smartcache snapshots, 2048 default generation amount, and 600s backend request timeout.

bridge.notes: Codex bridge context limit follows the KoboldCPP Qwopus coder 32k backend profile.

backend_profiles.description: KoboldCPP-managed GGUF profile for testing the Qwopus coder GGUF against the current llama.cpp default and EXL3 baseline.

services.name: litellm
services.notes: Routes local model calls to the configured upstream backend.

services.name: bridge
services.notes: Codex should use this endpoint, not raw TextGen or raw LiteLLM.

provider_profiles.name: local-qwen-codex
provider_profiles.launch_command: LOCAL_QWEN_CODEX_GOAL_MODE=guarded LOCAL_QWEN_MODEL=qwen-local LOCAL_QWEN_TOOL_OUTPUT_TOKEN_LIMIT=1200 LOCAL_QWEN_CODEX_CONTEXT_WINDOW=65536 LOCAL_QWEN_CODEX_AUTO_COMPACT_LIMIT=56000 LOCAL_QWEN_MODEL_CATALOG_JSON={repo_root}/config/local_llm_stack/qwen_local_model_catalog.json CODEX_TEXTGEN_DUPLICATE_BROAD_READ_GUARD=1 CODEX_TEXTGEN_READ_DUMP_GUARD=1 scripts/run_local_qwen_codex.sh --cwd {project}

task_prompt_policy.notes: Use named files, Qwendex receipts, and bounded shell commands. Project-specific row or research workflows must be configured by the consuming repository.
